testcase.name: auth_and_taskFilters_work

o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists comments cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists labels cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists projects cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists task_labels cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists tasks cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table comments ( author_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, task_id bigint not null, body TEXT not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table labels ( id bigint generated by default as identity, color varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table projects ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, description TEXT, name varchar(255) not null, project_key varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table task_labels ( label_id bigint not null, task_id bigint not null, primary key (label_id, task_id) ) Hibernate: create table tasks ( due_date date, overdue boolean not null, assignee_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, project_id bigint not null, reporter_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, description TEXT, priority varchar(255) not null check (priority in ('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH','URGENT')), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('TODO','IN_PROGRESS','IN_REVIEW','DONE')), title varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, full_name varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('ADMIN','MEMBER')), primary key (id) )
